suite_name: login ctt withe extrnal user and verify the ctt home page and open project

positive_scenarios.expected_result: User is successfully authenticated and redirected to the CTT home page displaying the correct user session
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Verify the login page is displayed with username field, password field, and Login button
Enter 'testd1051@gmail.com' in the email/username field
Enter the valid password in the password field
Click the 'Login' / 'Submit' button
Verify the page redirects away from the login URL
Verify the CTT home page is displayed successfully
Verify the logged-in user identifier or welcome message reflects 'testd1051@gmail.com' or associated display name
positive_scenarios.title: Successful login with valid external CTT user credentials

positive_scenarios.expected_result: CTT home page loads completely with all UI components — navigation, header, project list, and branding — rendered correctly without errors
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Enter 'testd1051@gmail.com' in the email/username field
Enter the valid password in the password field
Click the 'Login' / 'Submit' button
Verify the CTT home page is displayed
Verify the navigation menu/header is visible
Verify the projects section or project list is displayed on the home page
Verify there are no broken elements, console errors, or loading spinners still active
Verify the page title or branding matches the CTT application
positive_scenarios.title: Verify CTT home page UI elements are fully loaded after login

positive_scenarios.expected_result: The selected project opens successfully and the project detail/workspace page is displayed with relevant project content
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Enter 'testd1051@gmail.com' in the email/username field
Enter the valid password in the password field
Click the 'Login' / 'Submit' button
Verify the CTT home page is displayed with the project list
Identify at least one project listed on the home page
Click on the first available project name or 'Open' button associated with a project
Verify the project detail page or project workspace is displayed
Verify the project name on the detail page matches the one selected from the home page
Verify key project elements (e.g., project details, tasks, or content area) are loaded
positive_scenarios.title: Open a project from the CTT home page after successful login
